goal: Ensure the DeepSeek agent path consumes yoagent 0.8.3's foundation ModelConfig and compat flags while only layering yoyo-specific endpoint and client identity policy locally.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: The harness silently reimplements DeepSeek provider defaults that now belong to released yoagent, making future provider behavior drift harder to catch.
